name: @inferlane/mcp-server
description: Multi-provider LLM cost optimization tools for AI agents. Estimate costs, compare models, get recommendations, check promotions, track spend, and route requests through a cost-optimized proxy.

npx.description: Run directly via npx without installation

authentication.description: API key is optional. 3 tools (il_estimate_cost, il_compare_models, il_suggest_model) work offline with no key. 3 tools (il_check_promotions, il_get_spend, il_route_request) require an API key.

tools.name: il_estimate_cost
tools.description: Estimate LLM API call cost across providers. Works offline — no API key required.

tools.name: il_compare_models
tools.description: Compare equivalent models across providers on price, speed, and context window. Works offline — no API key required.

tools.name: il_suggest_model
tools.description: Get a model recommendation for a given task based on cost, quality, and speed tradeoffs. Works offline — no API key required.

tools.name: il_check_promotions
tools.description: Check active provider promotions and free-tier offers. Requires API key.

tools.name: il_get_spend
tools.description: Get spend summary by period (daily, weekly, monthly). Requires API key.

tools.name: il_route_request
tools.description: Route LLM requests through a cost-optimized proxy with automatic provider selection. Requires API key.
